text:
Author: wen
Date: Sun May 11 13:45:12 2014
New Revision: 353689
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353689
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353689/

Log:
  - Update to 0.9.1
  
  PR:		189315
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/py-mako/Makefile
  head/textproc/py-mako/distinfo

Modified: head/textproc/py-mako/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-mako/Makefile	Sun May 11 13:43:05 2014	(r353688)
+++ head/textproc/py-mako/Makefile	Sun May 11 13:45:12 2014	(r353689)
@@ -2,10 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	mako
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.0
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.1
 CATEGORIES=	textproc www python
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.makotemplates.org/downloads/ \
-		CHEESESHOP
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	Mako-${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -20,7 +19,7 @@ BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}be
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USE_PYTHON=		yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	Mako
 

Modified: head/textproc/py-mako/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-mako/distinfo	Sun May 11 13:43:05 2014	(r353688)
